name: golang-dev-skills
description: A collection of Go development skills for Claude Code, covering Fyne GUI development and Go coding guidelines.

plugins.name: fyne-gui-dev
plugins.description: Fyne cross-platform GUI application development. Use when creating, modifying, debugging, or understanding Fyne GUI applications.

plugins.name: fyne-gui-dev-cn
plugins.description: Fyne 跨平台 GUI 应用开发。当用户需要创建、修改、调试、或理解 Fyne GUI 应用时使用此技能。

plugins.name: golang-guideline
plugins.description: Go language development guide. Use when editing, reviewing, debugging, or understanding Go code. Covers development workflow, code style, toolchain usage, and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: golang-guideline-cn
plugins.description: Go语言开发指南。当编辑、审查、调试、理解Go语言代码时使用此技能，包含开发流程、代码风格、工具链使用、故障排查等。

plugins.name: mockey-ut
plugins.description: mockey runtime function/variable mock library for Go unit tests. Use when you need to mock functions, methods, or variables via patching.

plugins.name: mockey-ut-cn
plugins.description: mockey 运行时函数/变量 mock 库。当需要在 Go 单元测试中对函数、方法或变量进行 Patch 时使用此技能。
